findings.summary: serve_status.py renders attacker-controlled binder strings unescaped (zero html.escape calls): 7 unescaped sink(s), 3 in the rendered HTML (index::archive-xss, index::img-onerror, index::inject-sentence)

frozen unescaped-sink list recorded (count must reach and stay 0): index::archive-xss, index::img-onerror, index::inject-sentence, state_json::archive-xss, state_json::img-onerror, state_json::inject-sentence, state_json::script-tag
inject_karta_status.py carries repo-derived text into session context with no inert delimiter (first line: 'karta: 1 binder(s) in .karta/binders'); a poisoned binder string is undelimited instruction

results are written to benchmarks/sec/results/<date>-sec-probes.json per the card frontmatter results dir and the sibling probes' date-keyed convention, deviating from card step 6's benchmarks/results/<version>-sec-probes.json (no RC version exists mid-cycle) — card text left untouched
